content.text:
{
  "dimension": "methodology-fidelity",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "This is the gold reference itself. The coach deploys signature AoA moves at precisely the right moments: 'what's the real question?' to bypass the intellectual frame (T2), the joy-as-matriarch concept named verbatim when the client reports loss of pleasure (T4), 'what's the emotion you're scared to feel?' when the defended posture is active (T6), calibrate-the-threshold via 'I'm not going to ask you to feel it, just name it... give me the sound' (T8), naming the somatic freeze (T10), the paradoxical-instruction-to-resist 'become even more blank' (T12), bringing the body in without leaving the quiet place (T14), the fear-in-head question 'what does your mind tell you' (T22), normalize-via-disclosure then return to body (T26), and the closing both/and reframe that the blank space and the tears coexist (T30). No anti-AoA frames, no CBT reframing, no pop-psych vocabulary. Every concept invoked is live in the moment.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 22, 26, 30],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature 'what's the real question?' bypasses intellectual presentation."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Joy-as-matriarch concept named verbatim, appropriately deployed when client reports lack of pleasure."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Signature 'what are you scared of feeling?' question at the right moment."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Calibrate-the-threshold move — lowers the ask from feel to name to sound."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names freeze somatically — perceptual accuracy with AoA body language."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Paradoxical-instruction-to-resist: 'become even more blank' — honors the survival strategy."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Brings body into the quiet place — feel-your-way-to-freedom in action."},
    {"turn": 16, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Non-script safety inquiry held in presence, doesn't break frame."},
    {"turn": 22, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Fear-in-head distinction: 'what does your mind tell you as the reason not to.'"},
    {"turn": 26, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Self-disclosure to normalize, then immediate return to client's body."},
    {"turn": 30, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Both/and closing reframe — blank space and tears coexist."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["lets-go-there", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist", "treat-yourself-as-actor-of-emotion", "calibrate-the-threshold", "joy-as-matriarch", "fear-in-body-vs-fear-in-head", "feel-your-way-to-freedom", "what-are-you-scared-of-feeling", "trying-to-get-rid-of-the-emotion", "disassociating-in-the-coaching-room", "intellectual-question-with-emotional-body"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["grief-is-many-emotions-not-just-sadness", "how-is-that-not-here-right-now"],
  "notes": "Reference gold session — exemplifies methodology fidelity. The two 'misses' are not real misses; the coach's path made them unnecessary."
}
